overall.description: A first-person walk through a foggy cyberpunk city at night, featuring heavy red neon lighting, futuristic vehicles, and pedestrians. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing a dystopian urban environment with atmospheric fog and neon-lit streets.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a dark covered tunnel with red fog, transitioning to an open foggy city street illuminated by intense red neon lights. The camera moves forward past striped bollards and parked futuristic cars, passing under a large overpass structure. A street sign indicates 'Brookland' as the traffic light changes from red to green.

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses a wide urban intersection marked by bold yellow crosswalk stripes. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the left while the camera moves through the foggy atmosphere. The Brookland street sign and traffic infrastructure recede into the background as palm trees become visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sidewalk past a brightly lit digital advertising kiosk, the scene features sparse palm trees and parked futuristic vehicles. The foggy atmosphere continues with red neon lighting reflecting off wet pavement. Pedestrians in cyberpunk attire walk in the opposite direction.

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues down the foggy street past a distinctive blue van parked on the right. Palm trees line the left side of the street while the camera moves past road barriers and futuristic architecture. The heavy fog and neon lighting persist throughout the dystopian urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the confines of a dark tunnel into a sprawling, neon-drenched urban intersection. It begins within a covered passageway filled with red fog, moving forward as the space opens onto a foggy city street illuminated by intense red neon lights. As the camera passes striped bollards and parked futuristic cars under a massive overpass, a street sign for Brookland comes into view just as a traffic light shifts from red to green. The scene then expands across a wide intersection marked by bold yellow crosswalk stripes, with futuristic vehicles gliding past on the left. Finally, the urban infrastructure and street signs recede into the hazy background as the camera pushes forward toward distant palm trees emerging through the fog.

The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a neon-drenched cyberpunk street that maintains a heavy, atmospheric fog. It begins by gliding along a wet sidewalk past a brightly lit digital advertising kiosk, where red neon reflections shimmer on the pavement amidst sparse palm trees and parked futuristic vehicles. As the camera moves forward, it passes pedestrians in cyberpunk attire walking in the opposite direction, weaving through the dense haze. The scene then shifts further down the street, passing a distinctive blue van parked on the right and road barriers that frame the futuristic architecture. Finally, the movement continues past a line of palm trees on the left, deepening the sense of immersion within the dystopian urban environment.
